executives.name: Tony Makuch
executives.background: Mr. Makuch is a professional engineer with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as President and CEO of Kirkland Lake Gold Ltd. from 2016 to 2022, where he led the company through significant growth and its eventual merger with Agnico Eagle Mines Limited. He has also held executive roles at Lake Shore Gold Corp. and FNX Mining Company Inc.

executives.name: Andreas Rompel
executives.background: Dr. Rompel has over 30 years of experience in the exploration and mining industry. He has held various senior positions with Anglo American and has extensive experience in project management and exploration across several continents. He holds a PhD in Geology from the University of the Witwatersrand.

executives.name: Forbes Gemmell
executives.background: Mr. Gemmell has over 15 years of experience in the capital markets and mining industry. He previously served as Vice President, Corporate Development and Investor Relations at Discovery Silver. Prior to joining the company, he worked in equity research and investment banking focused on the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Murray John
board_of_directors.background: Mr. John is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the resource sector. He was formerly the President and CEO of Dundee Resources Limited and served as a director of several mining companies including Osisko Gold Royalties Ltd. and Alamos Gold Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Jeff Parr
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Parr is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the CFO of Centerra Gold Inc. and has served on the boards of several mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Moira Smith
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Smith has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in exploration and geology. She was previously the VP Exploration for Liberty Gold Corp. and has held senior positions with Teck Resources and Fronteer Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Daniel Naiberg
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Naiberg is a corporate lawyer with extensive experience in mergers and acquisitions and corporate finance within the mining sector. He is a partner at a leading Canadian law firm.
